risk_title: Unfavorable Security Situation Impeding Project Implementation
risk_summary: The project's implementation has been moderately delayed due to an unfavorable security situation in Afghanistan, affecting the pace of civil works contracts and overall project progress.
evidence_quote: This was largely because of the unfavorable security situation, delays in onboarding the project's key personnel, slow progress in civil works contracts, and in disbursing grants to the Community Development Councils (CDC) for implementing watershed and irrigation subprojects.

risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High, indicating ongoing fragility in the institutional environment that could affect project implementation and sustainability.
